mods.title: Fire resurrection
mods.description: Should be compatiable with various item ownership mods so you can only rez at your own fires if you use them. Allows you to ressurect yourself as a ghost when you haunt the various fires Works in modes where you can rez at the portal. Also adds a board worth of fuel to the fire, which lights firepits, so you can rez at night and not die instantly. Works on: Campfire Firepit Endothermic Fire Endothermic Fire Pit Delux Campfires mod Has options to set hunger/health/sanity/max health penalty on res if the admin wishes. Lighting strike on rez can also be removed if you don't like it. Also has options to enable/disable rez at all supported fire types. Defaults are all previous behavior. Also has ...

mods.title: Infinite Tent Uses
mods.description: Simple mod that makes tents infinitely durable (aka sets the amount of uses to an unreasonably high number). Configure how many uses your tents have if you so wish, default setting is infinite. Now with Siestas, too.

mods.title: Insight (Show Me+)
mods.description: [h1]Thank you for 1 million subscribers![/h1] I never expected this many users. Thank you for your support! [h1]Background Information[/h1] Inspired by Show Me. Because I like to know everything about everything. Show me was nice, but it was inaccurate/weird for some things and just didn't have what I was looking for. This was coded from scratch, and I originally made it for DS. I ported it over! [url=https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=2081254154][b]Click for DS Version[/b][/url] [h1]Details[/h1] Whereas some mods provide information only on inspection, this provides a tooltip with various information on mouse over. mods.title: Less lags
mods.description: =============================================================== [b]WARNING:[/b] This mod was made for experienced admins of long running public dedicated servers with huge amount of players. It is not recommended to use this mod in any other case! It is also recommended to read discussions before using this mod. =============================================================== I hate to see how lag most old dedicated servers (1000+ days), and how admins are being forced to erase whole world and restart game only because of lags. That is why I publish this mod. [h1]What it does[/h1] First, it periodically perform cleaning of the server. Cleaning deletes some items on the ground. You can specify...

mods.title: Map Revealer for DST
mods.description: [h1][b]DESCRIPTION[/b][/h1] It's a very simple mod revealing the entire map in the game, regardless of the level at which we find ourselves. Despite the simplicity makes it easy modding or just makes the game a lot easier. [h1][b]Mod has changed since the update 1.0. From now on, reveal map doesn't work automatically. Use the keyboard shortcuts below:[/b][/h1] [b]SHIFT + R - reveal map - works both: surface and caves (dedicated servers) worlds on all players but only host can use it.[/b] [b]SHIFT + F - fog of war disabled - works only for host on disabled caves.[/b] Have a nice use. [h1][b]FAQ[/b][/h1] Q:Mod not work, after i put shift+r combination map is still blank? A:It's normal... you m...

mods.title: Single Player Health
mods.description: [b]Lowers health of creatures to match Don't Starve (DS) single player.[/b] [h1]Which monsters are affected:[/h1] [list] [*]All mobs that had their Health Points (HP) increased in Don't Starve Together (DST) in comparison to DS, [*]Boss Monsters exclusive to DST (Bee Queen, Antlion, Toadstool, Misery Toadstool, Fuelreaver, Shadow Pieces, Malbatross, Celestial Champion, Crab King, Eye of Terror, Twins of Terror), [*]Some lesser mobs exclusive to DST (Ewecus), [/list] [h1]What has been changed:[/h1] [list] [*]In most cases HP has been halved, [*]Other cases involve reducing health more than half (i.e Toadstool, Ancient Guardian), [*]Health and/or count of minions spawned by bosses (Bee Queen, ...

mods.title: 冰箱保鲜，反鲜
mods.description: 使冰箱里的食物永久保鲜，还可以返鲜。这是一个超强的保鲜mod，甚至能抵抗蛤的毒的腐败，食物放在冰箱的时间够久甚至能延长保质期到上万天，喜欢的请给五星（ps：由于官方的更新现在保质期最长10天了，我有时间研究一下看能不能解决）

mods.title: 掉落堆叠(Drop & Stack)
mods.description: [b]新模式: 真正的全堆叠.[/b] 旧模式兼容项: 标准掉落(砍树,挖矿,鸟笼,杀怪,等等); 交易(猪王,鱼王,蚁狮,神话聚宝盆); 猪人便便; 石果开采; 熊大毛丛;邪天翁羽毛;格罗姆黏液; 灰烬; 风滚草采集;包裹拆解; 地皮挖掘; 食物腐烂; 刮剃(牛毛人须). [b]New Mode: The Really All Stacking.[/b] The list of supported drops by Old Mode: Standard drops(Chop, Mine, Birdcage, Kill, etc.); Trade(Pig King, King of the Merms, Antlion, Treasure Bowl from Myth Words); Pig Man's Manure; Mining of Stone Fruit; Bearger's Fur Tuft; Malbatross Feather; Glommer's Goop; Ashes; Picking of Tumbleweed; Unwrapping of Bundle; Digging of Turf; Rotting F...

mods.title: 无限耐久
mods.description: 自定义配置物品耐久是否为无限,并移除百分比显示 Customize whether item durability is infinite and remove 100% display 自定义配置箱子与保鲜背包等是否保鲜或反鲜 Customize whether Chest and Insulated Pack are Always Fresh or Refresh 重排了物品文本顺序,补齐了缺失的物品,增加了各角色专属物品 添加了箱子与保鲜背包等物品建筑的保鲜设定 原作者为 MK 改动自 Yuki_Spike 添加温蒂专属物品 添加了游戏最新的道具 补全了背包保鲜 这里有个合集 https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3490334555
